query:
-- Check Brett Hansen's assignedBusinessLines to confirm resolveRepLaneCategory will return 'pump' via repNameOverride
SELECT u.name, up.assignedBusinessLines
FROM users u JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name = 'Brett Hansen';
